qa_pairs.question: Why do Alliance accounts need to be renewed annually?
qa_pairs.answer: The annual renewal of all user accounts is essential to collect up-to-date information required by granting agencies and to deactivate accounts that are no longer in use.

qa_pairs.question: Who is required to renew their Alliance account and by when?
qa_pairs.answer: All Alliance users must renew their account between May 6 and June 9, 2026, or it will be automatically deactivated.

qa_pairs.question: Do recently created Alliance accounts need to be renewed?
qa_pairs.answer: If you created your account after January 1, you do not have to renew it at this time, but you must still accept new policies and consents on CCDB.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the Privacy Policy and other agreements I've accepted?
qa_pairs.answer: All agreements you accept on CCDB can be viewed on the Agreements page (https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/agreements/user_index), and policies are also available on the Alliance website.

qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of a primary role in an Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Your primary role helps manage accounts with multiple roles, facilitates communication with users, and assists with reporting, generally corresponding to your main, longest-held position.

qa_pairs.question: Can a user change their primary role?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, users with multiple active roles can change their primary role at any time on CCDB's 'Home' page by clicking the 'Make this role primary' checkbox next to their desired role.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if my Alliance account role has changed (e.g., new faculty position or Master's to PhD)?
qa_pairs.answer: You must apply for a new role via CCDB ('My Account' → 'Apply for a new role'), requesting one role at a time, and can choose to disable old roles if no longer needed.

qa_pairs.question: If my account has been deactivated but I need to access my data on Alliance Federation clusters, what should I do?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to support@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with your request.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if my account renewal question is not answered in the FAQ?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with your request.

qa_pairs.question: What are the consequences if a faculty member with sponsored users does not renew their Alliance account by the deadline?
qa_pairs.answer: Their account, along with the accounts of all sponsored users, will be deactivated, pausing jobs and causing the research group to lose access to files until the sponsor's account is reactivated.

qa_pairs.question: What steps are involved for a faculty member to renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: You will receive an email with a link to the CCDB form to update contact information, Field of Research, complete a User Satisfaction Survey, update the status of sponsored roles, and then click 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL'.

qa_pairs.question: If a PI with a faculty role moves to a different institution, will their sponsored users automatically transfer to the new role?
qa_pairs.answer: No, any user you want to sponsor with your new faculty role will have to apply for a new role sponsored by your new faculty position, and you may need to add them to your Resource Allocation Project (RAP).

qa_pairs.question: Can a PI access files of a sponsored user who has moved on and is no longer under their sponsorship?
qa_pairs.answer: Consent from that user may be required, so it is important to make arrangements with your sponsored user as soon as possible to mitigate risk.

qa_pairs.question: What is the process for a user with a sponsored role (e.g., Doctoral, Masters) to renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: You will receive an email directing you to the CCDB form to update contact information, complete the form, fill out a User Satisfaction Survey, and then click 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' once your sponsor has marked you as continuing.

qa_pairs.question: My sponsored role is still deactivated even after I completed its renewal on CCDB. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: Your role will be activated only once your sponsor confirms that your role is continuing AND renews their own account.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I renewed my account with the wrong sponsored role?
qa_pairs.answer: You should create a new role with your current information by logging into CCDB and going to 'My Account' → 'Apply for a new role'; your old role will automatically expire if not renewed.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if my sponsor cannot confirm an old sponsored role I am trying to reactivate?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca so that we can assist you with your request.
